## Checklist
- [ ] `pytest -q` is green
- [ ] Changes are surgical; no unrelated refactors
- [ ] No claim beyond what the sealed artifacts support (no recall/capability/"smarter"/awareness framing)
- [ ] Docs/numbers are sourced to a sealed file or auto-rendered (not hand-typed)
